ranked_movies.title: Spy
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively praised in the top post for its brilliant action-comedy blend, with specific acclaim for Jason Statham's hilarious performance and Rose Byrne's comedic force. It's described as crazy underrated and a perfect parody of spy tropes.

ranked_movies.title: Dumb and Dumber
ranked_movies.reason: The subject of a highly-upvoted post analyzing its comedic genius. Praised for its smart writing, perfect chemistry between Jim Carrey and Jeff Daniels, mix of slapstick and sincerity, and its status as a flawless, rewatchable comedy.

ranked_movies.title: The Big Lebowski
ranked_movies.reason: Explicitly mentioned as a user's personal favorite for its funniest moment (the Corvette scene) and recommended multiple times as a top-tier comedy with clever dialogue and quirky characters.

ranked_movies.title: Tropic Thunder
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted for several iconic, laugh-out-loud moments, particularly Robert Downey Jr.'s performance and his interactions with other characters. It's frequently recommended as a classic comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Hot Rod
ranked_movies.reason: Cited for a specific, memorably absurd line ('man pools are perfect for holding water') that crosses a user's mind daily. It's described as a movie that needs more love.

ranked_movies.title: Airplane!
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times as a timeless comedy that still elicits laughter. Its iconic dialogue ('Don't call me Shirley') is quoted, cementing its status as a must-see.

ranked_movies.title: The Jerk
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned for one of the single funniest moments ('Cans') and recommended in several threads as a foundational comedy classic.

ranked_movies.title: Billu
ranked_movies.reason: The subject of two highly-upvoted posts discussing Priyadarshan's film. Heavily praised for Irrfan Khan's performance and its emotional, heartfelt story, though noted as a remake of the Malayalam original 'Katha Parayumbol'.

ranked_movies.title: Friendship
ranked_movies.reason: A major point of discussion. Described as a polarizing, psychologically impactful comedy that deeply unsettled some viewers while others found it hilarious and a unique experience, typical of Tim Robinson's style.

ranked_movies.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery
ranked_movies.reason: Referenced in the 'Lampshade Hanging' trope discussion for its self-aware, fourth-wall-breaking humor. The entire trilogy is also recommended in a separate thread.

ranked_movies.title: Ghostbusters
ranked_movies.reason: Quoted for one of its most iconic and hilarious lines ('That man has no dick'), solidifying its place as a comedy with memorable moments.

ranked_movies.title: Raising Arizona
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its fun, goofy, and sweet Coen Brothers humor. Specifically mentioned for hilarious scenes involving John Goodman and tight-quarters physical comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Naked Gun
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended alongside other Leslie Nielsen classics as a pinnacle of slapstick comedy, known for its absurdity and relentless jokes.

ranked_movies.title: Shaun of the Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a top choice in a recommendation thread, praised for its perfect blend of horror and comedy, and cited as a prime example of Edgar Wright's style.

ranked_movies.title: Hot Fuzz
ranked_movies.reason: Ranked as the first choice in a comedy recommendation, highlighting its clever writing, action-comedy blend, and rewatchability.

ranked_movies.title: Anchorman
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a top-tier comedy, known for its quotable lines, iconic characters, and absurdist humor.

ranked_movies.title: The Emperor's New Groove
ranked_movies.reason: Used as a primary example in the 'Lampshade Hanging' trope discussion for its clever, self-aware acknowledgment of its own absurdity.

ranked_movies.title: Romy and Michele's High School Reunion
ranked_movies.reason: Noted as the only film from the 'Friends' cast's early comedy attempts that still holds up, praised for its quirky charm and humor.

ranked_movies.title: In Bruges
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as an incredibly dark, hilarious, and ridiculous black comedy with a perfect series of events and sharp dialogue.

ranked_movies.title: Game Night
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a recent, well-received comedy that is clever, suspenseful, and consistently funny.
